channel.title: Linux on The Blog of Suzl 🤠
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on The Blog of Suzl 🤠

item.title: How to Config A New Linux System
item.description: Config Manjaro(Brand New Linux System) For future config back and other intentions. Not hand by hand, just url Config in Manjaro First of all ：git config git config –gloable user.name “username” git config –gloable user.email “email” using ssh-keygen -t ras to generate ssh pub-keys, paste in to github settings in order to pull&&push code. Shell Config zsh && oh-my-zsh using curl sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.
